WITH yearly AS (SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE substr(Date,1,4) = '2013' GROUP BY CustomerID), seg AS (SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, y.total_consumption FROM customers c JOIN yearly y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND c.Segment IS NOT NULL), seg_min AS (SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total FROM seg GROUP BY Segment), seg_min_customers AS (SELECT s.Segment, s.total_consumption FROM seg s JOIN seg_min m ON s.Segment = m.Segment AND s.total_consumption = m.min_total), seg_avg AS (SELECT Segment, CAST(SUM(total_consumption) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS avg FROM seg_min_customers GROUP BY Segment) SELECT (sme.avg - lam.avg) AS SME_LAM_Diff, (lam.avg - kam.avg) AS LAM_KAM_Diff, (kam.avg - sme.avg) AS KAM_SME_Diff FROM (SELECT avg FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS sme, (SELECT avg FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS lam, (SELECT avg FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS kam

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CRP = '+' AND T1.Description IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Examination AS T1 JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.SM IN ('-', '+-') AND T1.Thrombosis = 0

SELECT L.name FROM League AS L JOIN "Match" AS M ON M.league_id = L.id WHERE M.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY L.id, L.name ORDER BY SUM(COALESCE(M.home_team_goal,0) + COALESCE(M.away_team_goal,0)) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT buildUpPlaySpeed FROM "Team_Attributes" WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL ORDER BY buildUpPlaySpeed DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', T1.birthday)) AS age FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97 AND T2.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'

SELECT team_fifa_api_id FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed > 50 AND buildUpPlaySpeed < 60

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.player_fifa_api_id) FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_fifa_api_id = T2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.birthday) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992'

SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.long_shots) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.player_fifa_api_id) FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_fifa_api_id = T2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE T2.player_name = 'Ahmed Samir Farag'

SELECT T1.name FROM League AS T1 JOIN "Match" AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id WHERE T2.season = '2009/2010' GROUP BY T1.name HAVING SUM(T2.home_team_goal) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.id) > SUM(T2.away_team_goal) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.id)
SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE substr(birthday,1,4) = '1970' AND substr(birthday,6,2) = '10'

SELECT AVG(home_team_goal) FROM "Match" AS T1 JOIN "Country" AS T2 ON T1.country_id = T2.id WHERE T2.name = 'Poland' AND T1.season = '2010/2011'

SELECT p.player_name FROM Player p JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id WHERE p.height IS NOT NULL AND p.height BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player) AND (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player) GROUP BY p.player_name HAVING AVG(pa.finishing) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY AVG(pa.finishing) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.overall_rating) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id) FROM "Player" AS t1 JOIN "Player_Attributes" AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.height > 170 AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) >= '2010' AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) <= '2015'

SELECT d.number FROM qualifying AS q JOIN drivers AS d ON q.driverId = d.driverId WHERE q.raceId = 903 AND q.q3 LIKE '0:01:54%'

SELECT d.driverId FROM drivers AS d JOIN results AS r ON d.driverId = r.driverId WHERE r.raceId = 592 AND r.time IS NOT NULL AND d.dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.dob ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT d.url FROM drivers AS d JOIN lapTimes AS lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId WHERE lt.raceId = 161 AND lt.time LIKE '1:27%'
SELECT lat, lng FROM circuits AS c JOIN races AS r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId WHERE r.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix'

SELECT T2.url FROM constructorResults AS T1 JOIN constructors AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId WHERE T1.raceId = 9 AND T1.points = (SELECT MAX(points) FROM constructorResults WHERE raceId = 9 AND points IS NOT NULL)
SELECT T1.code FROM "drivers" AS T1 JOIN "qualifying" AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.raceId = 45 AND T2.q3 LIKE '0:01:33%'
SELECT T1.url FROM "seasons" AS T1 JOIN "races" AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year WHERE T2.raceId = 901
SELECT T2.driverId FROM results AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 872 AND T1.time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.dob DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.nationality FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE CAST(T2.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) = (SELECT MAX(CAST(fastestLapSpeed AS REAL)) FROM results WHERE fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL) AND T2.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT ((CAST(r1.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) - CAST(r2.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL)) * 100.0) / CAST(r1.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) FROM results AS r1 JOIN results AS r2 ON r1.driverId = r2.driverId JOIN drivers AS d ON d.driverId = r1.driverId WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta' AND r1.raceId = 853 AND r2.raceId = 854 AND r1.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL AND r2.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.time IS NOT NULL AND T1.time <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.driverId) AS completion_rate FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.date = '1983-07-16'

SELECT name FROM races WHERE year = (SELECT CAST(strftime('%Y', MIN(date)) AS INTEGER) FROM races) AND CAST(strftime('%m', date) AS INTEGER) = (SELECT CAST(strftime('%m', MIN(date)) AS INTEGER) FROM races)

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T2.points FROM "drivers" AS T1 JOIN "driverStandings" AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.points = (SELECT MAX(points) FROM "driverStandings") AND T2.points IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.milliseconds, T3.forename, T3.surname, T2.name FROM "lapTimes" AS T1 JOIN "races" AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId JOIN "drivers" AS T3 ON T1.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T1.milliseconds IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(CAST(milliseconds AS REAL)) FROM lapTimes AS lt JOIN drivers AS d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId JOIN races AS r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix' AND lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN r.position > 1 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS percentage FROM results r JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton' AND ra.year >= 2010

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, ds.max_points FROM (SELECT driverId, COUNT(*) AS win_count, MAX(points) AS max_points FROM driverStandings WHERE wins > 0 GROUP BY driverId ORDER BY win_count DESC LIMIT 1) AS ds JOIN drivers d ON ds.driverId = d.driverId
SELECT CAST(strftime('%Y','now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', dob) AS INTEGER) AS age, forename, surname FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'Japanese' AND dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.name, c.name, c.location FROM races AS r JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE strftime('%Y', r.date) = '2005' AND strftime('%m', r.date) = '09'

SELECT DISTINCT "races"."name" FROM "races" JOIN "results" ON "races"."raceId" = "results"."raceId" JOIN "drivers" ON "results"."driverId" = "drivers"."driverId" WHERE "drivers"."forename" = 'Alex' AND "drivers"."surname" = 'Yoong' AND "results"."position" IS NOT NULL AND "results"."position" < 20

SELECT r.name, r.year FROM lapTimes lt JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher' AND lt.milliseconds = (SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds) FROM lapTimes lt2 JOIN drivers d2 ON lt2.driverId = d2.driverId WHERE d2.forename = 'Michael' AND d2.surname = 'Schumacher' AND lt2.milliseconds IS NOT NULL) AND lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.year, T2.points FROM "races" AS T1 JOIN "results" AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId JOIN "drivers" AS T3 ON T2.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Lewis' AND T3.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T1.year = (SELECT MIN(year) FROM "races" AS T4 JOIN "results" AS T5 ON T4.raceId = T5.raceId JOIN "drivers" AS T6 ON T5.driverId = T6.driverId WHERE T6.forename = 'Lewis' AND T6.surname = 'Hamilton')
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.country = 'Germany' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM "races" AS T2 JOIN "circuits" AS T1 ON T2.circuitId = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'European Grand Prix'
SELECT lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Silverstone Circuit'
SELECT circuitRef FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit'
SELECT nationality FROM drivers WHERE dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dob ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.driverRef FROM "drivers" AS T1 JOIN "results" AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN "races" AS T3 ON T2.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T3.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND T3.year = 2007 AND T2.positionOrder = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT T1.raceId FROM "results" AS T1 JOIN "drivers" AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN "races" AS T3 ON T1.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T1.rank IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.rank ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(CAST(fastestLapSpeed AS REAL)) FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2009 AND T1.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL

SELECT T1.positionOrder FROM results AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN races AS T3 ON T1.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T3.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T3.year = 2008
SELECT T1.time FROM "results" AS T1 JOIN "races" AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2008 AND T2.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T1.positionOrder = 2 AND T1.time IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivers WHERE driverId IN (SELECT driverId FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Chinese Grand Prix') AND time IS NOT NULL)

SELECT ((last_time - champ_time) * 100.0) / last_time AS faster_percentage FROM (SELECT (SELECT r.milliseconds FROM results r JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND r.position = 1 AND r.time IS NOT NULL AND r.milliseconds IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.position ASC LIMIT 1) AS champ_time, (SELECT r.milliseconds FROM results r JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND r.time IS NOT NULL AND r.milliseconds IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.position DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_time) sub
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "circuits" WHERE location = 'Adelaide' AND country = 'Australia'
SELECT MAX(cs.points) FROM constructorStandings AS cs JOIN constructors AS c ON cs.constructorId = c.constructorId WHERE c.nationality = 'British' AND cs.points IS NOT NULL
SELECT c.name FROM "constructors" AS c JOIN "constructorResults" AS cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId WHERE cr.raceId = 291 AND cr.points = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT cr.constructorId FROM constructorResults AS cr JOIN constructors AS c ON cr.constructorId = c.constructorId WHERE cr.points = 0 AND c.nationality = 'Japanese' AND cr.raceId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cr.constructorId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cr.raceId) = 2)

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS completion_percentage FROM results r JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE d.nationality = 'Japanese' AND ra.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009

WITH points_per_driver AS (SELECT ra.year, r.driverId, SUM(r.points) AS total_points FROM results r JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.year < 1975 GROUP BY ra.year, r.driverId), champions AS (SELECT p.year, p.driverId FROM points_per_driver p JOIN (SELECT year, MAX(total_points) AS max_points FROM points_per_driver GROUP BY year) m ON p.year = m.year AND p.total_points = m.max_points) SELECT c.year, AVG(CAST(substr(res.time,1,2) AS REAL)*3600 + CAST(substr(res.time,4,2) AS REAL)*60 + CAST(substr(res.time,7,2) AS REAL) + CAST(substr(res.time,10,3) AS REAL)/1000.0) AS avg_seconds FROM champions c JOIN results res ON res.driverId = c.driverId JOIN races ra ON res.raceId = ra.raceId WHERE ra.year = c.year AND res.time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.year ORDER BY c.year

SELECT MIN(lap) FROM lapTimes AS T1 JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId JOIN driverStandings AS T3 ON T2.driverId = T3.driverId JOIN races AS T4 ON T3.raceId = T4.raceId WHERE T4.year = 2009 AND T3.position = 1 AND T1.time LIKE '%:%:%' AND T1.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
SELECT AVG(CAST(fastestLapSpeed AS REAL)) FROM results AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T2.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix' AND T1.fastestLapSpeed IS NOT NULL

SELECT name FROM "cards" WHERE borderColor = 'borderless' AND (cardKingdomFoilId IS NULL OR cardKingdomId IS NULL) AND availability IS NOT NULL
SELECT c.name FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "legalities" AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.format = 'gladiator' AND l.status = 'Banned'
SELECT T1.uuid, T3.status FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "legalities" AS T3 ON T1.uuid = T3.uuid WHERE T1.types = 'Artifact' AND T1.side IS NULL AND T3.format = 'vintage'
SELECT T1.id, T1.artist FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "legalities" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE (T1.power = '*' OR T1.power IS NULL) AND T2.format = 'commander' AND T2.status = 'Legal'

SELECT T1.name, T1.artist, T1.isPromo FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "rulings" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid GROUP BY T1.uuid HAVING COUNT(T2.uuid) = (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(uuid) AS cnt FROM "rulings" GROUP BY uuid)) LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN language = 'Chinese Simplified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM "foreign_data"
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" WHERE power = '*'
SELECT borderColor FROM "cards" WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
SELECT format FROM legalities AS T1 JOIN cards AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.name = 'Benalish Knight'
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN borderColor = 'borderless' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM "cards"

SELECT (CAST((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "foreign_data" AS fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid WHERE c.isStorySpotlight = 1 AND fd.language = 'French') AS REAL) / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM "cards" AS c WHERE c.isStorySpotlight = 1) ) * 100 AS percentage
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" WHERE originalType = 'Summon - Angel' AND subtypes <> 'Angel'
SELECT id FROM "cards" WHERE duelDeck = 'a'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "legalities" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.status = 'Banned' AND T1.borderColor = 'white'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "foreign_data" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.originalType = 'Artifact' AND T1.colors = 'B'
SELECT convertedManaCost FROM "cards" WHERE layout = 'normal' AND frameVersion = '2003' AND borderColor = 'black' AND availability = 'mtgo,paper'
SELECT id, (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isStorySpotlight = 1 AND isTextless = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS percentage FROM "cards" WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1 GROUP BY id
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM "sets" AS s JOIN "set_translations" AS st ON s.code = st.setCode WHERE s.block = 'Commander' AND st.language = 'Portuguese (Brasil)'
SELECT DISTINCT fd.type FROM "foreign_data" AS fd JOIN "cards" AS c ON fd.uuid = c.uuid WHERE fd.language = 'German' AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" WHERE (power IS NULL OR power = '*') AND text LIKE '%triggered ability%'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "legalities" AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid JOIN "rulings" AS r ON c.uuid = r.uuid WHERE l.format = 'premodern' AND r.text = 'This is a triggered mana ability.' AND c.side IS NULL

SELECT fd.name FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "foreign_data" AS fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid WHERE c.artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson' AND c.layout = 'normal' AND c.borderColor = 'black' AND c.type LIKE '%Creature%' AND fd.language = 'French'
SELECT DISTINCT st.language FROM "set_translations" AS st JOIN "sets" AS s ON st.setCode = s.code WHERE s.baseSetSize = 180 AND s.block = 'Ravnica'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "legalities" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.format = 'commander' AND T2.status = 'legal'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.language = 'French' AND (T1.power IS NULL OR T1.power = '*') THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.power IS NULL OR T1.power = '*' THEN 1 END) * 100 FROM "cards" AS T1 LEFT JOIN "foreign_data" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.power IS NULL OR T1.power = '*'
SELECT language FROM "foreign_data" WHERE multiverseid = 149934
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 AND layout = 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM "cards"
SELECT DISTINCT st.language FROM "set_translations" AS st JOIN "sets" AS s ON st.setCode = s.code WHERE s.mcmName = 'Archenemy' AND s.code = 'ARC' AND st.language IS NOT NULL
SELECT DISTINCT fd.language FROM "foreign_data" AS fd JOIN "cards" AS c ON fd.uuid = c.uuid WHERE c.name = 'A Pedra Fellwar'
SELECT name FROM "cards" WHERE name IN ('Serra Angel','Shrine Keeper') AND convertedManaCost IS NOT NULL ORDER BY convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT translation FROM "set_translations" AS st JOIN "cards" AS c ON st.setCode = c.setCode WHERE c.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' AND st.language = 'Italian'
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "foreign_data" AS f ON c.uuid = f.uuid WHERE c.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' AND f.language = 'Korean')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "set_translations" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.setCode WHERE T2.translation = 'Hauptset Zehnte Edition' AND T1.artist = 'Adam Rex'
SELECT translation FROM set_translations WHERE setCode = (SELECT code FROM sets WHERE name = 'Eighth Edition') AND language = 'Chinese Simplified'
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "sets" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T1.name = 'Angel of Mercy' AND T2.mtgoCode IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "sets" AS T1 JOIN "set_translations" AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T1.block = 'Ice Age' AND T2.language = 'Italian' AND T2.translation IS NOT NULL

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = COUNT(CASE WHEN isForeignOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS only_outside_us FROM "cards" JOIN "sets" ON "cards".setCode = "sets".code WHERE "cards".name = 'Adarkar Valkyrie'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "sets" AS T1 JOIN "set_translations" AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T2.language = 'Italian' AND T2.translation IS NOT NULL AND T1.baseSetSize < 100
SELECT DISTINCT artist FROM "cards" WHERE setCode = 'CSP' AND artist IN ('Jeremy Jarvis', 'Aaron Miller', 'Chippy')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "sets" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T2.name = 'Coldsnap' AND T1.convertedManaCost > 5 AND (T1.power = '*' OR T1.power IS NULL)
SELECT T1.flavorText FROM "foreign_data" AS T1 JOIN "cards" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.language = 'Italian' AND T2.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
SELECT fd.text FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "sets" AS s ON c.setCode = s.code JOIN "foreign_data" AS fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid WHERE s.name = 'Coldsnap' AND fd.language = 'Italian' AND fd.type = 'ruling'

SELECT fd.name FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "foreign_data" AS fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid WHERE c.setCode = 'Coldsnap' AND fd.language = 'Italian' AND c.convertedManaCost IS NOT NULL AND c.convertedManaCost = (SELECT MAX(convertedManaCost) FROM "cards" WHERE setCode = 'Coldsnap' AND convertedManaCost IS NOT NULL)
SELECT (CAST(SUM(c.convertedManaCost = 7) AS REAL) / SUM(c.convertedManaCost) * 100) FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "sets" AS s ON c.setCode = s.code WHERE s.name = 'Coldsnap'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL AND cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM cards AS c JOIN sets AS s ON c.setCode = s.code WHERE s.name = 'Coldsnap'

SELECT l.format, c.name FROM legalities AS l JOIN cards AS c ON l.uuid = c.uuid WHERE l.status = 'Banned' AND l.format IN (SELECT format FROM (SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM legalities WHERE status = 'Banned' GROUP BY format) sub WHERE cnt = (SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM legalities WHERE status = 'Banned' GROUP BY format)))
SELECT c.name, l.format FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "legalities" AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE c.edhrecRank = 1 AND l.status = 'Banned'
SELECT c.name, l.format FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "sets" AS s ON c.setCode = s.code JOIN "legalities" AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE s.name = 'Hour of Devastation' AND l.status = 'Legal'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM "sets" AS T1 JOIN "set_translations" AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T1.code IN (SELECT setCode FROM "set_translations" WHERE language = 'Korean') AND T1.code NOT IN (SELECT setCode FROM "set_translations" WHERE language LIKE '%Japanese%')

SELECT DISTINCT c.frameVersion, c.name, l.format, l.status FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "legalities" AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams' AND (l.status = 'Banned' OR l.status IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY c.frameVersion, c.name
SELECT bond_type FROM bond WHERE bond_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bond_type ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count FROM atom WHERE element = 'o' AND molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type = '-') GROUP BY molecule_id)

SELECT CAST((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM bond b JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '+') AS REAL) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atom a JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '+')
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id FROM "molecule" AS m JOIN "bond" AS b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id WHERE b.bond_type = '#' AND m.label = '+'
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'c' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(atom_id) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type = '=')

SELECT DISTINCT a.element FROM atom AS a WHERE a.atom_id IN (SELECT c.atom_id FROM connected AS c WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR004_8_9' UNION SELECT c.atom_id2 FROM connected AS c WHERE c.bond_id = 'TR004_8_9')

SELECT DISTINCT a.element FROM atom a JOIN (SELECT c.atom_id AS atom_id FROM connected c JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '=' UNION SELECT c.atom_id2 AS atom_id FROM connected c JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '=') AS sub ON a.atom_id = sub.atom_id WHERE a.element IS NOT NULL
SELECT m.label FROM atom AS a JOIN molecule AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE a.element = 'h' AND m.label IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.label ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT element FROM atom AS T1 JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '-' GROUP BY element ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T3.bond_type FROM "connected" AS T1 JOIN "bond" AS T3 ON T1.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE (T1.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND T1.atom_id2 = 'TR004_20') OR (T1.atom_id = 'TR004_20' AND T1.atom_id2 = 'TR004_8')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id JOIN "bond" AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE (T1.element = 'i' OR T1.element = 's') AND T3.bond_type = '-'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.molecule_id NOT IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'f') THEN T1.molecule_id END) * 100 AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) AS percentage FROM molecule AS T1 WHERE T1.label = '+'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) AS percentage FROM "bond" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id JOIN "bond" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '#' AND T3.label = '+'
SELECT DISTINCT element FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR000' AND element IS NOT NULL ORDER BY element ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = '=' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(bond_id) * 100, 5) AS percent FROM "bond" WHERE molecule_id = 'TR008'
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(molecule_id) * 100, 3) AS percent FROM molecule
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(element = 'h') AS REAL) / COUNT(atom_id) * 100, 4) AS percent FROM "atom" WHERE molecule_id = 'TR206'
SELECT a.element, m.label FROM "atom" AS a JOIN "molecule" AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE a.molecule_id = 'TR060'

SELECT b.bond_type, CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS is_carcinogenic FROM bond AS b JOIN molecule AS m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE b.molecule_id = 'TR010' GROUP BY b.bond_type, m.label ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT "molecule".molecule_id FROM "molecule" JOIN "bond" ON "molecule".molecule_id = "bond".molecule_id JOIN "connected" ON "bond".bond_id = "connected".bond_id WHERE "molecule".label = '-' AND "bond".bond_type = '-' ORDER BY "molecule".molecule_id ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "bond" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR009' AND (T2.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR T2.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12')
SELECT T1.bond_type, T2.atom_id, T2.atom_id2 FROM "bond" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.bond_id = 'TR001_6_9'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `connected` WHERE `atom_id` LIKE 'TR%_19' OR `atom_id2` LIKE 'TR%_19'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.molecule_id = 'TR004'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE SUBSTR(T1.atom_id, 7, 2) BETWEEN '21' AND '25' AND T2.label = '+'

SELECT DISTINCT c.bond_id FROM connected AS c JOIN atom AS a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id JOIN atom AS a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id WHERE (a1.element = 'p' AND a2.element = 'n') OR (a1.element = 'n' AND a2.element = 'p')

SELECT CASE WHEN T1.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_carcinogenic FROM "molecule" AS T1 JOIN "bond" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.bond_type = ' = ' GROUP BY T1.molecule_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(COUNT(c.bond_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) FROM "atom" AS a LEFT JOIN "connected" AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id WHERE a.element = 'i'
SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id NOT IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected)

SELECT atom_id FROM "connected" c JOIN "bond" b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '#' AND b.molecule_id = 'TR041' UNION SELECT atom_id2 FROM "connected" c JOIN "bond" b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '#' AND b.molecule_id = 'TR041'

SELECT DISTINCT a.element FROM (SELECT atom_id AS aid FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR144_8_19' UNION SELECT atom_id2 AS aid FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR144_8_19') AS sub JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id = sub.aid

SELECT a.element FROM atom AS a JOIN connected AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id JOIN bond AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '#' UNION ALL SELECT a2.element FROM atom AS a2 JOIN connected AS c2 ON a2.atom_id = c2.atom_id2 JOIN bond AS b2 ON c2.bond_id = b2.bond_id WHERE b2.bond_type = '#'
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(m.label = '+') AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(b.bond_id), 5) FROM "bond" AS b JOIN "molecule" AS m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE b.bond_type = '-'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atom a WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bond b WHERE b.molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND b.bond_type = '#') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM atom a2 WHERE a2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND a2.element IN ('p','br'))

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.atom_id) * 100 AS percent FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id JOIN "bond" AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '-'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11' UNION SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id2 WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) * 100 AS percentage FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '+'
SELECT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '+' AND substr(T1.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS ratio, label FROM atom JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id WHERE atom.molecule_id = 'TR006' GROUP BY atom.molecule_id, label
SELECT m.molecule_id FROM "molecule" AS m JOIN "atom" AS a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '-' GROUP BY m.molecule_id HAVING COUNT(a.atom_id) > 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.AvgScrMath > 400 AND T2.Virtual = 'F'
SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE (COALESCE("Enrollment (K-12)",0) + COALESCE("Enrollment (Ages 5-17)",0)) > 500

SELECT MAX(CAST(frpm."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) / frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") FROM frpm JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds WHERE CAST(satscores.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / satscores.NumTstTakr > 0.3
SELECT s.CharterNum FROM satscores AS t JOIN schools AS s ON t.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE t.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND s.CharterNum IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.AvgScrWrite DESC

SELECT T1."School Name" AS SchoolName,
       COALESCE(T2.Street, '') ||
       CASE WHEN T2.StreetAbr IS NOT NULL AND T2.StreetAbr <> '' THEN ' ' || T2.StreetAbr ELSE '' END ||
       CASE WHEN T2.City IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' || T2.City ELSE '' END ||
       CASE WHEN T2.State IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' || T2.State ELSE '' END ||
       CASE WHEN T2.Zip IS NOT NULL THEN ' ' || T2.Zip ELSE '' END AS FullAddress
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE (T1."Enrollment (K-12)" - T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > 30
  AND T1."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
  AND T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL

SELECT T3.School FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.CDSCode = T3.CDSCode WHERE (CAST(T1.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` AS REAL) / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)`) > 0.1 AND T2.NumGE1500 > 0
SELECT T3.FundingType FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.cds = T3.CDSCode WHERE T3.County = 'Riverside' AND T1.AvgScrMath > 400 GROUP BY T3.CDSCode, T3.FundingType

SELECT T3.School AS "School Name", T3.Street, T3.City, T3.State, T3.Zip FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.CDSCode = T3.CDSCode WHERE T1.`High Grade` = '12' AND T1.`County Name` = 'Monterey' AND T1.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` > 800

SELECT satscores.sname AS "School Name", satscores.AvgScrWrite AS "Average Writing Score", schools.Phone AS "Communication Number" FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE (schools.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR schools.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01') AND satscores.AvgScrWrite IS NOT NULL

WITH diffs AS (
    SELECT 
        T1."School Name" AS school_name, 
        T3.DOCType AS doc_type, 
        (T1."Enrollment (K-12)" - T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS enrollment_diff
    FROM frpm AS T1 
    JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.CDSCode = T3.CDSCode
    WHERE T3.FundingType = 'Local'
), avg_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(enrollment_diff) AS avg_enrollment_diff FROM diffs
)
SELECT school_name, doc_type 
FROM diffs, avg_diff 
WHERE enrollment_diff > avg_enrollment_diff
SELECT CAST("Free Meal Count (K-12)" AS REAL) / "Enrollment (K-12)" AS eligible_free_rate FROM frpm WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9

SELECT CAST("FRPM Count (K-12)" AS REAL) / "Enrollment (K-12)" FROM frpm WHERE "IRC" = 66 AND "FRPM Count (K-12)" IS NOT NULL AND "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.Zip, s.State FROM satscores AS sc JOIN schools AS s ON sc.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE sc.NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL AND sc.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL AND sc.NumTstTakr != 0 ORDER BY CAST(sc.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / sc.NumTstTakr ASC LIMIT 1

WITH max_school AS (SELECT cds FROM satscores WHERE NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY NumGE1500 DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT s.AdmFName1 AS first_name, s.AdmLName1 AS last_name FROM schools s JOIN max_school m ON s.CDSCode = m.cds WHERE s.AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT s.AdmFName2, s.AdmLName2 FROM schools s JOIN max_school m ON s.CDSCode = m.cds WHERE s.AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT s.AdmFName3, s.AdmLName3 FROM schools s JOIN max_school m ON s.CDSCode = m.cds WHERE s.AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
SELECT AVG(s.NumTstTakr) FROM satscores AS s JOIN schools AS sc ON s.cds = sc.CDSCode WHERE sc.City = 'Fresno' AND sc.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31' AND s.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL
SELECT s.Phone FROM schools AS s JOIN satscores AS sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds WHERE s.District = 'Fresno Unified' AND sc.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(sc.AvgScrRead AS REAL) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT sub.School FROM (SELECT s.CDSCode, s.School, s.County, ss.AvgScrRead, s.Virtual, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rn FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE ss.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL) sub WHERE sub.Virtual = 'F' AND sub.rn <= 5

SELECT T2.School, T1.AvgScrWrite FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE (T2.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich' AND T2.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci') OR (T2.AdmLName2 = 'Ulrich' AND T2.AdmFName2 = 'Ricci') OR (T2.AdmLName3 = 'Ulrich' AND T2.AdmFName3 = 'Ricci')

SELECT T1."School Name" FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.DOC = '31' AND T1."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(T1."Enrollment (K-12)" AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / 12 FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alameda' AND DOC = '52' AND strftime('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980'
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = '54' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = '52' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Orange' AND (DOC = '52' OR DOC = '54')

SELECT T3.School AS "School Name", T3.MailStreet AS "Postal Street Address" FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.cds = T3.CDSCode WHERE T1.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.County = 'Los Angeles' AND T2.Charter = 0 AND (T1.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` * 100.0 / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)`) < 0.18
SELECT "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.EdOpsCode = 'SSS' AND T2.City = 'Fremont' AND T1."Academic Year" = '2014-2015'

SELECT "School Name", (CAST("FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" * 100) AS "Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm WHERE "County Name" = 'Los Angeles' AND "Low Grade" = 'Kindergarten' AND "High Grade" = '9'
SELECT "County", COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM "schools" WHERE "Virtual" = 'F' AND "County" IN ('San Diego','Santa Barbara') GROUP BY "County" ORDER BY school_count DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT "Low Grade", "High Grade" FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.Longitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(T2.Longitude) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT City, COUNT(*) AS school_count, SUM(CASE WHEN "NSLP Provision Status" = 'Multiple Provision Types' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS multiple_provision_count FROM schools WHERE Magnet = 1 AND "Low Grade" = 'K' AND "High Grade" = '8' AND City IS NOT NULL GROUP BY City ORDER BY City

SELECT (CAST(frpm."Free Meal Count (K-12)" AS REAL) / NULLIF(frpm."Enrollment (K-12)",0) * 100) AS "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)", frpm."District Code" FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.AdmFName1 = 'Alusine' OR schools.AdmFName2 = 'Alusine' OR schools.AdmFName3 = 'Alusine'

SELECT DISTINCT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3 FROM schools WHERE County = 'San Bernardino' AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified' AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31' AND (SOC = '62' OR DOC = '54') AND (AdmEmail1 IS NOT NULL OR AdmEmail2 IS NOT NULL OR AdmEmail3 IS NOT NULL)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "district" AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id JOIN "trans" AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T2.A3 = 'East Bohemia' AND T3.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT T1.district_id FROM client AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' GROUP BY T1.district_id HAVING AVG(CAST(T2.A11 AS REAL)) > 6000 AND AVG(CAST(T2.A11 AS REAL)) < 10000) AS sub
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.A3 = 'North Bohemia' AND T2.A11 > 8000

WITH female_clients AS (SELECT client_id, district_id, birth_date FROM client WHERE gender = 'F'), oldest_female AS (SELECT district_id, MAX(birth_date) AS oldest_birth_date FROM female_clients GROUP BY district_id), district_avg_salary AS (SELECT district_id, A11 AS avg_salary FROM district WHERE A11 IS NOT NULL), min_avg_salary_district AS (SELECT district_id FROM district_avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary ASC LIMIT 1), max_avg_salary_district AS (SELECT district_id FROM district_avg_salary ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 1), gap AS (SELECT (SELECT avg_salary FROM district_avg_salary WHERE district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM max_avg_salary_district)) - (SELECT avg_salary FROM district_avg_salary WHERE district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM min_avg_salary_district)) AS salary_gap) SELECT T3.account_id, (SELECT salary_gap FROM gap) AS salary_gap FROM oldest_female T1 JOIN female_clients T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id AND T1.oldest_birth_date = T2.birth_date JOIN disp T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN min_avg_salary_district T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id

SELECT T1.account_id FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T3.birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client) AND T4.A11 = (SELECT MAX(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FROM district) GROUP BY T1.account_id

SELECT a.account_id FROM "account" AS a JOIN "loan" AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE l.status = 'approved' AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' AND l.amount = (SELECT MIN(l2.amount) FROM "loan" AS l2 WHERE l2.status = 'approved' AND strftime('%Y', l2.date) = '1997')

WITH filtered AS (SELECT a.account_id, l.amount FROM "account" AS a JOIN "loan" AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE l.duration > 12 AND strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993') SELECT account_id FROM filtered WHERE amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM filtered)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT client.client_id) FROM client JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id WHERE client.gender = 'F' AND client.birth_date < '1950-01-01' AND district.A2 = 'Sokolov'

SELECT T4.A2 FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T1.birth_date = '1976/1/29'

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM client WHERE district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia' AND A4 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A4 DESC LIMIT 1)

WITH first_loan_client AS (
    SELECT T1.account_id
    FROM loan AS T1
    JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
    WHERE T1.status = 'A' AND T1.date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY T1.date ASC
    LIMIT 1
), 
balance_1993 AS (
    SELECT T1.balance
    FROM trans AS T1
    JOIN first_loan_client AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
    WHERE T1.date = '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY T1.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
), 
balance_1998 AS (
    SELECT T1.balance
    FROM trans AS T1
    JOIN first_loan_client AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
    WHERE T1.date = '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY T1.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT (CAST((T2.balance - T1.balance) AS REAL) / T1.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM balance_1993 AS T1, balance_1998 AS T2
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'A' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(amount)) * 100 FROM loan
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.status = 'C' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM loan AS L JOIN account AS A ON L.account_id = A.account_id WHERE L.amount < 100000

SELECT T4.A3 AS district, CAST((T4.A13 - T4.A12) AS REAL) / T4.A12 * 100 AS unemployment_increment_percentage FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T2.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.status = 'D'

SELECT d.A2 AS district FROM district AS d JOIN account AS a ON d.district_id = a.district_id JOIN disp AS dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id JOIN client AS c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' GROUP BY d.A2 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 9

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loan AS L JOIN account AS A ON L.account_id = A.account_id WHERE L.status = 'A' AND L.amount >= 250000 AND A.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE' AND L.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name, t.amount FROM "trans" AS t JOIN "account" AS a ON t.account_id = a.account_id JOIN "district" AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ' AND t.date LIKE '1996-01%' ORDER BY t.amount DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) FROM "account" AS a JOIN "loan" AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE a.district_id = 1 AND l.status IN ('C','D')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "client" WHERE gender = 'M' AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM "district" WHERE A15 = (SELECT A15 FROM "district" WHERE A15 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A15 DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1))

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id FROM trans AS t JOIN account AS a ON t.account_id = a.account_id JOIN disp AS d ON a.account_id = d.account_id WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND t.date >= '1998-01-01' AND t.date < '1999-01-01' AND t.amount < (SELECT AVG(CAST(amount AS REAL)) FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND date >= '1998-01-01' AND date < '1999-01-01')
SELECT DISTINCT T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.frequency != 'OWNER' AND T2.A11 > 8000 AND T2.A11 <= 9000
SELECT AVG(A15) FROM "district" WHERE A15 > 4000 AND district_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT district_id FROM "account" WHERE date >= '1997-01-01')

SELECT T1.trans_id FROM trans AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T3.client_id = 3356 AND T1.operation = 'VYBER' AND T1.type = 'PRIJEM'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T4.A11 > 10000

SELECT (CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END),0)) * 100 AS growth_rate FROM loan l JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id WHERE c.gender = 'M'

SELECT frequency, SUM(CASE WHEN k_symbol = 'account_st' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS statement_requests, SUM(CASE WHEN k_symbol = 'debiting' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_debiting_amount FROM account JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id WHERE account.account_id = 3 GROUP BY frequency

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' THEN T1.client_id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' THEN T1.client_id END) * 100 FROM "client" AS T1 JOIN "disp" AS T3 ON T1.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN "account" AS T2 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'

SELECT T1.account_id FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T3.gender = 'F' AND T4.A11 = (SELECT MIN(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FROM district) AND T3.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F' AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE CAST(A11 AS REAL) = (SELECT MIN(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FROM district)))
SELECT AVG(T1.amount) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.status IN ('C', 'D') AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, (strftime('%Y','now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) AS age FROM "client" AS c JOIN "disp" AS d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN "card" AS cr ON d.disp_id = cr.disp_id WHERE cr.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER'

SELECT a.account_id, d.A2, d.A3 FROM "account" AS a JOIN "district" AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "trans" AS t WHERE t.account_id = a.account_id AND a.date > t.date)

SELECT a.account_id, a.frequency FROM "account" AS a JOIN "disp" AS d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN "client" AS c ON d.client_id = c.client_id JOIN "district" AS dist ON a.district_id = dist.district_id WHERE dist.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND CAST(strftime('%Y', a.date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1995 AND 2000
